fn calculate_calldata_gas(input: &[u8]) -> Result<u64, &'static str> {
    input
        .iter()
        .map(|&byte| if byte == 0 { ZERO_BYTE_COST } else { NON_ZERO_BYTE_COST })
        .try_fold(TX_BASE_COST, |acc, cost| acc.checked_add(cost))
